title: Simply Swords - All the Smites
description: This Datapack adds Smite to all Greathammers and Greatswords that exist in the mod Simplyswords.
body:
This Datapack adds Divine Smite to iron-, gold-, diamond-, netherite- and runic greatswords/greathammers as well as to the watcher.

Initially made for Prominence II, you can still use this for your own pack, if you are using the RPG series with Spell engine and simply swords of course.
